sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales_data (id UInt32, amount Float32, category String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO sales_data (id, amount, category) VALUES (1, 100.0, 'A'), (2, 200.0, 'B'), (3, 150.0, 'A'), (4, 300.0, 'C');
SELECT id, amount, category, SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY id) AS total_amount FROM sales_data QUALIFY total_amount > 200;
UPDATE sales_data SET amount = amount * 1.1 WHERE category = 'A';
SELECT id, amount, category, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY amount DESC) AS rank FROM sales_data QUALIFY rank = 1;
